topIngredients.name: Titanium Dioxide 6%
topIngredients.benefit: Physical blocker for UVA/UVB with no skin penetration

topIngredients.name: Hyaluronic Acid
topIngredients.benefit: Maintains skin hydration under sun protection

verdict: CeraVe Mineral Sunscreen provides genuine broad-spectrum protection with a clean, reef-safe formula. The ceramide base keeps skin nourished while the mineral filters offer zero irritation risk for sensitive skin.
